CLOUD_ATB.title: ATB
CLOUD_ATB.description:
Represents combat momentum.

Gain ATB from attacks and effects. 
Attack-based gain is limited by your Max ATB, but other effects may exceed this limit.
Spend ATB to use powerful cards.

You gain 1 ATB at the start of your turn if you have 0 ATB.
CLOUD_LIMIT.title: Limit
CLOUD_LIMIT.description:
Builds as you fight. 

Gain 3 Limit when attacking or blocking attacks.
Gain 3 Limit at the start of your turn.
Gain Limit equal to damage taken. 

At full Limit, powerful [gold]Limit Break[/gold] attacks become available. 

Limit is consumed when Limit Break is used.
CLOUD_SUMMON.title: Summon
CLOUD_SUMMON.description:
Builds as you fight. 

Gain 1 Summon when attacking.
Gain 4 Summon when using Magic cards.

At full Summon, choose a [gold]Summon[/gold] to call forth.

Summons deal high damage grant powerful bonuses for 3 turns.

Summon is consumed after use.
